reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of language-centered discovery; does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links protocol invention, mathematical derivation, salience regimes, and pool-mixing failure.
falsifiable_why: Can be tested by systems succeeding in protocol invention or deep derivation despite linguistic architecture.
explanation: Language-first discovery works for salient or traceable problems, but fails where progress needs new measurements or mathematics.
